$comment: Spike 3 single schema source. tool/generate.dart projects this catalog into BOTH lib/src/generated/registry.g.dart (typed Dart factories) and lib/src/generated/tool_schema.g.json (LLM-facing JSON Schema). Edit THIS file, then re-run the generator.

node.description: A named container component. Holds an ordered list of child components referenced by id.

field.description: A leaf component holding a single named string value. Cannot have children.

value.description: Current string value of the field.
